headline: FDA approves higher dose version of weight loss drug Wegovy as Novo Nordisk tries to win back market share
summary: The high-dose Wegovy helped patients with obesity lose an average 20.7% of their weight after 72 weeks in a phase three trial.

headline: Pfizer aims for wider use of PARP drug in prostate cancer with new data
summary: While sales of Talzenna, which Pfizer acquired in a $14 billion deal, have been “negligible” so far, the new results should justify use in earlier lines of care, one analyst said.

headline: The $3.4 billion lesson Big Pharma needs to learn: its shelved drugs could save millions of patients
summary: More than 5,000 shelved drug candidates were discontinued for business reasons, not safety ones. A new push aims to match them with the highest need.

headline: TALZENNA Plus XTANDI Significantly Improves Radiographic Progression-Free Survival in Metastatic Prostate Cancer
summary: NEW YORK, March 19, 2026--Pfizer Inc. (NYSE: PFE) today announced positive topline results from the Phase 3 TALAPRO-3 study of TALZENNA® (talazoparib), an oral poly ADP-ribose polymerase (PARP) inhibitor, in combination with XTANDI® (enzalutamide), an androgen receptor pathway inhibitor (ARPI), in people with homologous recombination repair (HRR) gene-mutated metastatic castration-sensitive prostate cancer (mCSPC), also known as metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer (mHSPC).

raw.headline: TALZENNA Plus XTANDI Significantly Improves Radiographic Progression-Free Survival in Metastatic Prostate Cancer
raw.summary: NEW YORK, March 19, 2026--Pfizer Inc. headline: Reassessing Pfizer (PFE) Valuation As Shares Trade Around Recent Levels
summary: Pfizer (PFE) is back in focus after recent trading left the shares around $27.32, prompting investors to reassess the company’s value score of 3, revenue of $62.6b, and net income of $7.7b. See our latest analysis for Pfizer. Recent trading has been choppy, with a 9.11% 90 day share price return and an 8.50% year to date share price return, while the 1 year total shareholder return sits at 11.80%. However, the 3 year total shareholder return remains negative at 18.17%, so recent momentum...
